chunks.text: oRDER SHEET __-_ HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Order with signature of Judge of main case. 5. Iotrammad Mansoor Mir, advocate for the Petitioner. Saifullah, AAG alongwith Ms. Nasreen Setho, State Council. Petitioner is aggrieved by acceptance of the nomination FFrs of Syed Abrar 'Ali Shah for the reason that vide Dtification dated 25.08.2014 he was appointed as Coordinator to the Chief Minister Sindh and that the Returning Officer has nrongly accepted the nomination papers. Upon acceptance of nomination papers appeal was filed which too, was dismissed on the ground that the Respondent No.4 was not a civil servant s'ithin the meaning of Section 2(b) Sindh Civil Service Act, 1973 Counsel for the Petitioner contends that Respondent No.4 upon 6 enjoying his appointmentl all the perks and privileges of an employee of Govemment of Sindh and a copy of notification was also sent to Accountant General Sindh so that he can be paid remunerations. He also referred to Section 36(e) of the Sindh Local Government Act, 2013 which provides that a person shall be disqualified if he is in the service of any statutory body which is owned or controlled by Federal or Provincial government or council. Learned AAG was asked to confirm as to whether Respondent No.4 was still holding the post of Coordinator to ief Ster Sindh, which he after confirmation from the C.P. No.D-6492120rs I cerned office states that he is still in service. In this yieg, of matter it is clearly apparent that the Respondent No.4 is also bolding the public office within the meaning of Section 36(e herefore, his nomination papers were wrongly accepted.

No.D-6492120rs I cerned office states that he is still in service. In this yieg, of matter it is clearly apparent that the Respondent No.4 is also bolding the public office within the meaning of Section 36(e herefore, his nomination papers were wrongly accepted. Hence, re reverse the order of Appellate Authority and reject the nomination papers of Respondent No.4. This petition is allowed in above terms. 7 ? ChieT Justice W-,Iudge I
